//autogenerated by RSCG_Templating from file {{fileName}}
{{
func folderNameForClass(className)
	if className == "BootStrapIcons"
		ret "Bootstrap"
	end
	if className == "LucideIcons"
		ret "Lucide"
	end
	if className == "TailwindlabsHeroicons"
		ret "TailwindlabsHeroicons"
	end
	if className == "GlinckerTheSvgIcons"
		ret "glinckerthesvg"
	end
	ret ""
end

func containsFolder(sv, folderName)
	lastIndex = sv.pathArr.size - 1
	ret sv.pathArr[lastIndex - 1] == folderName
end
}}
{{ if data.className == "IconLookupShared" }}
namespace {{data.nameSpace}} {

	static partial class {{data.className}} {
		public static string[] MaybeIs(string name, string[] iconNames)
		{
			var min = int.MaxValue;
			var matches = new global::System.Collections.Generic.List<string>();

			foreach (var iconName in iconNames)
			{
				var distance = global::Fastenshtein.Levenshtein.Distance(name, iconName);

				if (distance < min)
				{
					min = distance;
					matches.Clear();
					matches.Add(iconName);
				}
				else if (distance == min)
				{
					matches.Add(iconName);
				}
			}

			return matches.ToArray();
		}

		public static global::SvgIconGenerator.IconDto? FromName(
			string name,
			global::System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary<string, global::SvgIconGenerator.IconDto?> iconsByName)
		{
			return iconsByName.TryGetValue(name, out var icon) ? icon : null;
		}
	}
}
{{ else }}
{{ 
folderName = folderNameForClass data.className
func containsCurrentFolder(sv)
	ret containsFolder sv folderName
end
filterForFolder = pathFiles | array.filter @containsCurrentFolder
}}
// {{filterForFolder[0].pathArr}}
//Number icons {{folderName}} {{filterForFolder.size }} 
namespace {{data.nameSpace}} {

	static partial class {{data.className}} {
		public static string[] IconNames = new []{
		{{ for file in filterForFolder }}
		"{{file.nameNoExt}}",
		{{end}}
		};

		private static readonly global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, global::SvgIconGenerator.IconDto?> IconsByName = CreateIconsByName();

		private static global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, global::SvgIconGenerator.IconDto?> CreateIconsByName()
		{
			var icons = new global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, global::SvgIconGenerator.IconDto?>(
				global::System.StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
		{{ for file in filterForFolder }}
		// {{ 
		result = file.namePascal
		}}
			icons["{{result}}"] = {{result}};
			icons["{{file.nameNoExt}}"] = {{result}};
		{{ end }}
			return icons;
		}

		public static string[] MaybeIs(string name) => IconLookupShared.MaybeIs(name, IconNames);

		public static global::SvgIconGenerator.IconDto? FromName(string name) => IconLookupShared.FromName(name, IconsByName);
	}
}
{{ end }}
